original: \nLuckily your airtight outfit prevents any effects from the chemical spray.
textify(r||(r=(0,y.Z)(["You shrug off the effects of her psionic attack, resisting them entirely."])))
textify(u||(u=(0,y.Z)(["You fail to resist the psychic attack, and all your reactions slow to a halt."])))
textify(h||(h=(0,y.Z)(["You deftly avoid the twin barrage of tongues."])))
textify(c||(c=(0,y.Z)(["The tongues smack into your body in a rapid double hit. The blows are much more powerful than they seem, and rock you back."])))
textify(g||(g=(0,y.Z)(["You deftly avoid the aphrodisiac-laced tongue."])))

textify(p||(p=(0,y.Z)(["The tongue slams into your body, and ","."])),t?"while your suit stops the aphrodisiac attack, the blow still hurts":"in addition to the physical blow a heavy dose of aphrodisiac splashes onto your body")
